queries.question: Which directors have won an Oscar award and which producers have won the same award?
queries.sql:
SELECT Production.FullName
FROM Production
WHERE (Production.Film_Profession = "Director" OR Production.Film_Profession = "Producer") AND Production.Award = "Oscar"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?production a :Production .
  ?production p:name ?fullname .
  ?production p:Film_Profession ?film_profession_w .
  ?production p:Film_Profession ?film_profession_w2 .
  ?production p:Award ?award_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?film_profession_w) = "Director" || STR(?film_profession_w2) = "Producer")) && STR(?award_w) = "Oscar"))
}

queries.question: Show directors and producers who have won Oscar.
queries.sql:
SELECT Production.FullName
FROM Production
WHERE Production.Film_Profession = "Director" OR Production.Film_Profession = "Producer" AND Production.Award = "Oscar"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?production a :Production .
  ?production p:name ?fullname .
  ?production p:Film_Profession ?film_profession_w .
  ?production p:Film_Profession ?film_profession_w2 .
  ?production p:Award ?award_w .
  FILTER((STR(?film_profession_w) = "Director" || (STR(?film_profession_w2) = "Producer" && STR(?award_w) = "Oscar")))
}
